SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2025 BY JUDGE CHRISTOPHER C. HITE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KAMEN KAMENOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBINHOOD FINANCIAL LLC (FRANCIS CHOI) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAMENOV, KAMEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROBINHOOD FINANCIAL LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-16-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN FEENEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KAMEN KAMENOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBINHOOD FINANCIAL LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)
